panels.title: Messages (last 5 min)
panels.description: ACARS message rate sanity check — should rarely be 0 during the day at a busy airport

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT uniq(flight) AS flights FROM acars.messages WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND flight != ''
SELECT uniq(tail) AS tails FROM acars.messages WHERE timestamp > today() AND tail != ''
SELECT count() AS total FROM acars.messages WHERE timestamp > today()

panels.title: Messages per minute (24h)
panels.description: Look for diurnal pattern matching airport traffic curve

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS t, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT flight, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND flight != '' GROUP BY flight ORDER BY msgs DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT tail, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND tail != '' GROUP BY tail ORDER BY msgs DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Messages by ACARS label
panels.description: Label is the 2-char ACARS message type (e.g. _d=DCDU, H1=ACARS-over-VHF, B6=position report)

targets.rawSql: SELECT label, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND label != '' GROUP BY label ORDER BY msgs DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Messages per frequency channel
panels.description: Which 131.* MHz channel is hottest right now

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(round(freq_mhz, 3)) AS freq, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY freq ORDER BY msgs DESC
SELECT toStartOfFifteenMinutes(timestamp) AS t, avg(level_db) AS level FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT concat(depa, '-', dsta) AS route, count() AS msgs FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND depa != '' AND dsta != '' GROUP BY route ORDER BY msgs DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Recent messages
panels.description: Last 100 ACARS messages — joins on tail to ADS-B (cross-DB query) once classifier feedback is wired

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, freq_mhz, level_db, label, flight, tail, msgno, text FROM acars.messages WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Frequency activity (MV: acars.freq_activity)
panels.description: Validates the classifier-feedback loop. Each row = (freq, dongle) with last_seen and total count. Spectrum classifier reads this to confirm ACARS stations.

targets.rawSql: SELECT freq_mhz, dongle_id, last_seen, message_count, round(avg_level_db, 1) AS avg_level FROM acars.freq_activity FINAL ORDER BY message_count DESC
